headline: Coinbase Ties Bitcoin Collateral To Fannie Mae Mortgages And Future Fees
summary: Coinbase Global partnered with Better Home & Finance to support what is described as the first Fannie Mae backed, Bitcoin collateralized mortgage in the U.S. The product lets qualified homebuyers use Bitcoin and USDC held with Coinbase as collateral for a Fannie Mae eligible home loan. This marks a new link between digital assets and a long established U.S. housing finance program. For investors watching NasdaqGS:COIN, this move connects Coinbase more directly with the U.S. housing finance...

headline: How Low Can MSTR Stock Go?
summary: Holding equities means accepting volatility as the price of long-term compounding. Across the 15 major systemic shocks where Strategy (MSTR) traded, the stock posted an average drawdown of -28%. For context, the S&P 500 averaged a -16% decline during those same periods.

headline: Bitcoin and Ethereum Head Toward 52-Week Lows. Cryptocurrencies Hit a Brick Wall.
summary: A month ago, it looked like cryptocurrency prices may be stabilizing after their steep decline last fall.  Bitcoin  has tumbled 2.1% to about $63,600 over the last 24 hours, continuing a brutal slide since hovering around $80,000 throughout the first half of May. The coin is now dangerously close to its 52-week low of $60,559.  Ethereum  the second-largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization, hasn’t fared much better.

headline: 3 Bear Put Spread Trade Ideas For This Tuesday
summary: A bear put spread is a vertical spread that aims to profit from a stock declining in price. It has a bearish directional bias as hinted in the name. Unlike the bear call spread, it suffers from time decay so traders need to be correct on the direction of the underlying and also the timing.

raw.headline: 3 Bear Put Spread Trade Ideas For This Tuesday
